title: Silent Murmur
overview: Movie Overview: Silent Murmur  Genre: Psychological Drama | Social Thriller  Runtime: Approx. 100 minutes  Target Audience: 18+ | Fans of Promising Young Woman, The Girl on the Train, Mare of Easttown  Logline  When her vibrant younger sister dies under suspicious circumstances, a quiet woman sets out to uncover the truth—and in doing so, finds the strength to speak for countless others silenced by abuse.
